title: Sapphire Tools and Armor Mod
description: This mod adds Sapphire Tools, Armor, and a cool new boss.
body:
This mod adds Sapphire Tools, Armor, and a cool new boss. Sapphire Armor and tools can be made with sapphire which is found in caves. sapphire is better than diamond. The Piglin Demon is found in nether wasteland biome. The boss drops a Demonic Hammer.


Sapphire Armor and tools can be made with sapphire which is found in caves. sapphire is better than diamond.

The Piglin Demon is found in nether wasteland biome. The boss drops a Demonic Hammer.
